creator: jszhao@yeah.net
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #3)

After sbcl updated to sbcl-1.5.2,1, I run maxima, and I got the following message:

fatal error encountered in SBCL pid 6026(tid 0x800727000):
core was built for runtime "120amd64-default-job-21-root-2019-03-09-01-15-04" but this is "120amd64-default-job-21-root-2019-05-11-01-15-11"

I think it means that the maxima I used was not compiled using the that latest sbcl. Yes, it's the fact. The maxima not updated by pkg when it upgraded sbcl. So I have to remove maxima, and install maxima again, and then maxima works.

The original bug report, I might not describe the problem clearly.

Best,
Jinsong
